# Luthers Works
This site contains St. Louis Edition (St.Lb) of Luther's works, in 25 volumes.

St. Louis Edition[^1] of Luther's works is based on [The Walch Edition](https://beggarsallreformation.blogspot.com/2009/10/walch-edition-of-luthers-works.html){:target="_blank"}[^2] published by [Johann Georg Walch](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Johann_Georg_Walch){:target="_blank"} (1740–1752).

[The Walch Edition](https://beggarsallreformation.blogspot.com/2009/10/walch-edition-of-luthers-works.html){:target="_blank"} was revised from 1885-1910 (in St. Louis), and may sometimes be referred to as `St.Lb`[^3]

## Collaborate and contribute!
We will encourage you to collaborate on the content of this book. You can contribute in the same way as collaborators on GitHub Docs[^4]. Read about it [here](https://docs.github.com/en/contributing/collaborating-on-github-docs/about-contributing-to-github-docs).

[^1]: St. Louis Edition is also sometimes referred to as `Walch Edition 2`, 
[^2]: _Walch Edition_ is also called `Halle` because it was published in _Halle an der Saale_.
[^3]: _Walch Edition_ can sometimes be abbreviated as `St.L`, maybe therefore the revision sometimes is referred to as `St.Lb`.
[^4]: The GitHub Docs, like this version of Luther's works, is written in markdown (md) format.
